title: crepis runcinata var. glauca
intro: Crepis runcinata var. glauca, also known as the hairy hawk's beard, is a plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting overall health and well-being. The health benefits of Crepis runcinata var. glauca include its potential to reduce fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Crepis runcinata var. glauca can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
